prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Harrop HTV 2300 TVS supercharger kit (engine code AJ-V8, 4.0L or 4.2L naturally aspirated) with a custom pulley reduction to 3.2" (81mm) for 8-10 psi boost, paired with a Snow Performance Stage 3 methanol injection system (50/50 mix) to control intake temps and prevent detonation, targeting 420-450 wheel horsepower on 93 octane fuel

Full exhaust system replacement with a custom 3" stainless steel setup from MagnaFlow, featuring 409-grade mandrel-bent tubing, a X-pipe crossover (positioned post-catalytic converters), and a pair of 5" rolled-edge resonated mufflers (part #14815) for a deep, aggressive tone without drone, while retaining OEM-style exhaust tips for sleeper aesthetics

Suspension overhaul with KW Variant 3 coilovers (part #35221001) with custom valving for the XK8's unique double-wishbone front and multi-link rear geometry, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) to correct scrub radius and improve turn-in response, along with polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1044K) for the front control arms and subframe
estetica: Full widebody conversion using the Rare Rides XK8 Liberty Edition kit, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with integrated vents, rear quarter panels with aggressive flares (3.5" wider than stock), and a custom carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated dual-exit exhaust cutouts, all finished in a custom matte British Racing Green with gold pinstriping

OEM+ interior refresh with a full retrim in Bridge of Weir Nappa leather (color-matched to the exterior), featuring diamond-stitched door cards, a custom Alcantara headliner with contrast red stitching, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm diameter) wrapped in perforated leather with a gold horn button

Lightweight wheel setup with BBS LM-R II forged wheels (19x9.5 +25 front, 19x11 +30 rear) in a custom gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear), paired with AP Racing 6-piston front (355mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (330mm rotors) big brake kit with gold calipers and custom Jaguar-branded center caps
